mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fe_achievements(id,course_id,achievement_score, objective_id, user_id, classroom_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{courseId}, #{reachScore}, #{objectiveId}, #{userId}, #{classroomId}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO fe_assessment_category_achievements(id,assessment_category_id, course_id, achievement_score, user_id, classroom_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id},#{categoryId}, #{courseId}, #{reachScore}, #{userId}, #{classroomId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.user_id as userId, a.assessment_category_id as assessmentCategoryId, b.category_name as assessmentCategoryName, b.percent as percent, a.achievement_score as achievementScore FROM fe_assessment_category_achievements a LEFT JOIN fe_assessment_categories b ON a.assessment_category_id = b.id WHERE a.classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT a.user_id as userId, a.objective_id as objectiveId, b.objective_name as objectiveName, a.achievement_score as achievementScore FROM fe_achievements a LEFT JOIN fe_course_objectives b ON a.objective_id = b.id WHERE a.classroom_id = #{classroomId}
SELECT percent FROM fe_assessment_categories WHERE id = #{categoryId}
